span.p: Stage 8: Output Methods

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Stage 2: Document Length Check

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: Stage 1: Tokenization

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: Raw Input

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: ≤510 tokens

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: No

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: Yes

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: Next token

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Raw Text Input
─────────────────
'Dear John Smith,
please call 555-123-4567
regarding your account
4111-1111-1111-1111
Thank you!'

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
AutoTokenizer (mDeBERTa)
─────────────────
tokenize(text,
return_offsets_mapping=True,
add_special_tokens=False)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
len(tokens) >
MAX_CONTEXT_LENGTH - 2?
(512 - 2 = 510)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Single Chunk Path
─────────────────
Process all tokens
in one forward pass

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Sliding Window Path
─────────────────
STRIDE = 382 tokens
OVERLAP = 128 tokens
─────────────────
Chunk 0: tokens[0:510]
Chunk 1: tokens[382:892]
Chunk 2: tokens[764:1274]
...

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Overlap Deduplication
─────────────────
For overlapping regions:
Keep prediction with
highest confidence

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Add Special Tokens
─────────────────
[CLS] + input_ids + [SEP]
Length: N + 2

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Create Tensors
─────────────────
input_ids: torch.tensor
attention_mask: torch.ones
device: cuda / cpu

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
DeBERTa Forward Pass
─────────────────
model(input_ids, attention_mask)
─────────────────
Output: logits
Shape: (1, seq_len, 43)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Remove Special Token Predictions
─────────────────
logits = logits[:, 1:-1, :]
Shape: (1, N, 43)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Softmax Probabilities
─────────────────
probs = F.softmax(logits, dim=-1)
Shape: (N, 43)
Sum across classes = 1.0

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Shannon Entropy
─────────────────
H = -Σ(p × log(p))
─────────────────
High H: Multiple classes likely
Low H: Single class dominant
─────────────────
Range: [0, log(43)] ≈ [0, 3.76]

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Confidence Score
─────────────────
confidence = max(probs, dim=-1)
─────────────────
High: Model is certain
Low: Model is uncertain
─────────────────
Range: [1/43, 1.0] ≈ [0.023, 1.0]

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Argmax Predictions
─────────────────
pred_ids = argmax(probs, dim=-1)
─────────────────
Output: [12, 14, 0, 28, 0, ...]
Maps to labels via id2label

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Get Model Prediction
─────────────────
pred_label = id2label[pred_id]
e.g., 12 → 'B-GIVENNAME'

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Should Route to LLM?
─────────────────
entropy > 0.583?
confidence < 0.787?
Entity in ROUTABLE?
NOT I- token?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Keep Model Prediction
─────────────────
final_label = pred_label
source = 'Model'

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
LLM Disambiguation
─────────────────
1. Extract context (±400 chars)
2. Check cache (MD5 key)
3. Call LLM if cache miss
4. Validate BIO rules
5. Cache valid result

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Use LLM Correction
─────────────────
final_label = corrected_label
source = 'LLM (openai)'

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Store Token Result
─────────────────
{
token: 'John',
label: 'B-GIVENNAME',
confidence: 0.92,
entropy: 0.34,
source: 'Model',
char_start: 5,
char_end: 9
}

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Update Previous Label
─────────────────
prev_label = final_label
(for BIO consistency)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Token Results List
─────────────────
results: List[TokenResult]
─────────────────
[
{token: 'Dear', label: 'O', ...},
{token: 'John', label: 'B-GIVENNAME', ...},
{token: 'Smith', label: 'I-GIVENNAME', ...},
...
]

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BIO Decoding Logic
─────────────────
B-X: Start new entity of type X
I-X: Continue current entity
O: End current entity (if any)
─────────────────
Consecutive B-X, I-X, I-X
→ Single entity span

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Entity Spans
─────────────────
[
{text: 'John Smith',
label: 'GIVENNAME',
start: 5, end: 15,
confidence: 0.89},
{text: '555-123-4567',
label: 'TELEPHONENUM',
start: 29, end: 41,
confidence: 0.76},
{text: '4111-1111-1111-1111',
label: 'CREDITCARDNUMBER',
start: 63, end: 82,
confidence: 0.94}
]

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
analyze_text()
─────────────────
Returns: List[TokenResult]
Per-token predictions
with uncertainty scores

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
get_entities()
─────────────────
Returns: List[Entity]
Aggregated entity spans
with character offsets

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
redact_text()
─────────────────
Returns: str
─────────────────
'Dear ████████████,
please call ████████████
regarding your account
███████████████████
Thank you!'
